title: × neocupropsis ovensii
intro: × Neocupropsis ovensii, also known as Neocupropsis ovensii, is a hybrid plant species within the Asteraceae family, closely related to Cuphea and Neocupropsis genera. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neocupropsis ovensii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. Neocupropsis ovensii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
